mapper.select: select * from biz_instrument_attachment where deleted = 0 order by instrument_id asc, sort_no asc, id asc
select * from biz_instrument_attachment where instrument_id = #{instrumentId} and deleted = 0 order by sort_no asc, id asc
select * from biz_instrument_attachment where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into biz_instrument_attachment(instrument_id, file_name, file_url, file_type, sort_no, create_time, deleted) values(#{instrumentId}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileType}, #{sortNo}, #{createTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update biz_instrument_attachment set instrument_id = #{instrumentId}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, file_type = #{fileType}, sort_no = #{sortNo} where id = #{id}
update biz_instrument_attachment set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
update biz_instrument_attachment set deleted = 1 where instrument_id = #{instrumentId} and deleted = 0
